text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 23:17 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

Node A coordinates one unconditional, single-part whole-object PUT. Pure storage placement selects fixed nodes A/B/C for N=3; direct replica transfer must obtain W=2 checksum-valid durable acknowledgements, then the A/B/C control quorum commits the object-reference generation before S3 success. There is no degraded write: fewer than two data acknowledgements or loss of control quorum fails publication.
